title: IndexChangeRecipe
description:
Compares the same single-band index between two source images and produces difference / ratio / normalized-difference bands plus a categorical change map.

Use for: change in any continuous spectral index between two snapshots — deforestation (NDVI drop), burn severity (dNBR), water-body change (NDWI shift), urbanization (built-up index). Index-agnostic: operates on whichever band you choose.

Pipeline: (1) pull `band` from `fromImage` and `toImage`; (2) compute `difference = to − from`, `normalized_difference = (to − from)/(to + from)`, `ratio = to / from`; (3) if both have `errorBand`, propagate `error = sqrt(fromError² + toError²)` and `confidence = |difference|/error`; (4) materialize categorical `change` band from `legend.entries` — backend reverses entries and runs `ee.mosaic`, so **first entry in `entries` order whose constraints satisfied** wins. Pixels with `confidence ≤ options.minConfidence` get `difference` clamped to 0 (route to 'no change' bucket).

AOI = intersection of `fromImage` and `toImage` geometries.

dates.description: Cosmetic record of from/to dates. **EE backend does NOT read this** — date semantics come from underlying `fromImage`/`toImage`. Round-trip with GUI defaultModel only; LLM doesn't need to set.

inputImage.title: IndexChangeInputImage
inputImage.description: Source image (SEPAL recipe ref or EE asset) + the band to treat as the index + optional uncertainty band.

type.description: `RECIPE_REF` = SEPAL recipe id; `ASSET` = EE Image/ImageCollection asset id.

id.description: Recipe id or EE asset id (per `type`).

bands.description: All bands the source exposes. Use `image_bands({type, id})` to look up; copy the returned `bands` verbatim.

band.description: Index band on the source. Must appear in `bands`. `fromImage.band` and `toImage.band` must be comparable — typically same band name (e.g. both `ndvi`).

errorBand.description: Per-pixel uncertainty band on the source (must appear in `bands`). When BOTH inputs have it, recipe emits `error` and `confidence` bands; otherwise these aren't produced and `options.minConfidence` is silently ignored.

bandMin.description: Display-time min for `band` (GUI viz scaling; no processing effect). Use `image_visualizations({type, id, band})` and read `min` from the continuous viz entry; if no preset, fall back to -10000.

bandMax.description: Display-time max for `band`. Use `image_visualizations` like `bandMin`; fallback 10000.

errorBandMax.description: Display-time max for `errorBand`. Set when `errorBand` is set; use `image_visualizations({type, id, band: errorBand})`.

legend.title: IndexChangeLegend
legend.description:
Categorical change classes. `entries` (≥1) produces the `change` band; value = legend value of FIRST entry (in `entries` order) whose `constraints` are satisfied.

Defaults: 3 classes — Decrease (red), Stable (white), Increase (green) — keyed off sign of `difference`.

id.description: UUID — auto-filled if omitted, do not invent.

value.description: Class value stored in `change` band. Unique across entries.

booleanOperator.description: Combine `constraints`. `and` (default) = all required (per-pixel min over masks); `or` = any (per-pixel max). Ignored when `constraints` has 0 or 1 entries.

constraints.description: Constraint clauses combined per `booleanOperator`. Empty array masks whole image for this entry — usually not what you want.

constraint.title: IndexChangeConstraint
constraint.description:
Single comparison on `difference`. Comparison ops (`<`/`≤`/`>`/`≥`/`=`) use `value`; `range` uses `from`/`to`/`fromInclusive`/`toInclusive`.

`≤`/`≥` are unicode U+2264/U+2265 — JSON form `\u2264`/`\u2265`. Backend expects unicode, NOT `<=`/`>=`.

id.description: UUID — auto-filled if omitted, do not invent.

description.description: GUI summary; not read by backend.

image.description: Constraints reference this recipe's bands. Always literal `'this-recipe'`.

band.description: Always literal `'difference'`. EE backend's constraint-image map is `{'this-recipe': difference}` — only `difference` consulted, even though GUI mapping panel shows `normalized_difference`/`ratio` options (silent no-ops in backend; schema rejects them).

operator.description: Comparison. `≤`/`≥` = U+2264/U+2265 unicode (JSON `\u2264`/`\u2265`). `range` selects pixels with value in `[from, to]`.

value.description: RHS for `<`/`≤`/`>`/`≥`/`=`. Required for those; ignored for `range`.

allOf.description: Range operator requires from, to, fromInclusive, toInclusive.

minConfidence.description:
Min `confidence = |difference|/error` for a pixel to count as changed. Pixels with `confidence ≤ minConfidence` get `difference` clamped to 0 in change-band eval (routes to 'Stable'-equivalent bucket).

Default 2.5 (~2.5σ). Higher = more conservative (fewer change pixels, lower false positives); lower = catches more change with more noise. Range [0, 20]; log-scale slider.

**Only meaningful when BOTH `fromImage.errorBand` and `toImage.errorBand` are set** — otherwise `confidence` not produced and this is silently ignored.
